note: Reference golden vector for spinSeed (phase-5 entry gate G5.8, the string-to-uint32 derivation that turns SpinResult.spinId into the uint32 trigger seed). spinSeed is FNV-1a (32-bit) over the UTF-8 bytes of spinId. Computed from the runtime-core implementation; this is THE cross-runtime anchor Unity/Godot (and the WP-5.5 cross-language equivalence job, TASK-5.5.7) must reproduce exactly (integer-exact). The two anchor checks fnv1a-32('') = the offset basis 0x811c9dc5 and fnv1a-32('a') = 0xe40c292c are the canonical published FNV-1a-32 test vectors, so a port that matches these matches the algorithm. The triggerSeed0 column is hash32(spinSeed(spinId), 0): the per-effect trigger seed for effectInstanceIndex 0, locking the full spinId -> trigger-seed bridge. Regenerating this vector is a deliberate, reviewed act.
